content.raw:
Work

Systems, rooms, stories, and strange machines.

My work lives where creative technology meets public culture: AI community infrastructure, keynote systems, responsible training, visual storytelling, and experimental internet projects that help people make sense of what is coming.

Featured systems

BC + AI Ecosystem

Community infrastructure for responsible and inclusive AI across British Columbia.

Responsible AI Professional

A cohort-based certification for teams who need practical ethics while shipping real systems.

AI keynotes

Talks and workshops about AI, taste, creativity, community, responsibility, and what we refuse to automate.

Indigenomics AI

Support for Indigenous-led conversations about technology, sovereignty, economics, and future-building.

Creative AI Human Lab

Both Hands Full

A keynote, album, and operating metaphor for staying human while the tools get faster.

Punk Rock AI

Field notes, talks, and experiments for people who want the technology without the obedience training.

Ethos and MADE ON

Creative systems, Vancouver-made artifacts, and community-rooted experiments that keep the work local and alive.

Photography archive

Two decades of visual storytelling from conferences, movements, expeditions, music, and the people inside the machine.

Bring this work into your room

If you need a keynote, training program, ecosystem partner, or creative AI collaborator, start with the shape of the room and the people it needs to serve.

Talk about a project
